chunks.content:
Authentication
We use JWT-based authentication for the web app.

Authentication > Login
Users log in with email and password. On success, the backend returns an access token and a refresh token.

Authentication > Password reset
Password reset is handled through a signed reset link sent by email. Reset links expire after 30 minutes.

Authentication > API auth
Internal APIs between services should use service tokens, not user JWTs.
chunks.title: Authentication

chunks.content:
Billing Policy
Customers are billed monthly unless their contract explicitly states annual invoicing.

Billing Policy
Starter and Growth plans are billed monthly by default.
Enterprise billing cadence depends on contract terms.

Billing Policy
Invoices are generated automatically at the start of each billing cycle.
chunks.title: Billing Policy

chunks.content:
Failed Payments
If a payment fails, the account remains active for a 3-day grace period before service restrictions begin.

Failed Payments
Billing retries occur automatically during the grace period.

Failed Payments
Enterprise accounts may receive manual outreach from billing operations before restriction.
chunks.title: Failed Payments

chunks.content:
Invoices
Invoices are issued in PDF format and made available in the customer billing portal.

Invoices
Customers can request invoice contact updates through support.

Invoices
Invoice disputes are reviewed jointly by billing operations and support.
chunks.title: Invoices

chunks.content:
Refunds Policy
Refund requests must be submitted within 14 days of the billing date.

Refunds Policy
Requests submitted after the 14-day window are normally rejected unless a billing system error or duplicate charge is confirmed.

Refunds Policy
Approved refunds are usually processed within 5 business days.
chunks.title: Refunds Policy

chunks.content:
Billing Policy
Customers are billed monthly.

Billing Policy > Refunds
Refund requests must be submitted within 14 days of the billing date.

Billing Policy > Failed payments
If a payment fails, the account remains active for a 3-day grace period before restriction.
`
chunks.title: Billing Policy

chunks.content:
Northstar Metrics
Northstar Metrics is a fictional B2B SaaS company providing analytics, workflow automation, and support tooling for logistics teams, e-commerce operators, and internal operations departments.

Northstar Metrics > Mission
Northstar Metrics helps distributed operations teams detect issues faster, standardize responses, and reduce operational delays.

Northstar Metrics > Leadership
- CEO: Claire Moreau
- CTO: Julien Caron
- VP of Engineering: Sofia Benali
- Head of Support: Marc Lefevre
- Tech Lead, Onboarding: Nina Petrova
- Tech Lead, Billing: Thomas Rigal

Northstar Metrics > Headcount
As of January 2026, Northstar Metrics has 86 employees.

Northstar Metrics > Offices
- Paris headquarters
- Lyon support hub
- Barcelona commercial office
chunks.title: Company Overview

chunks.content:
Leadership Team > Executive Team
Claire Moreau serves as CEO and is responsible for strategic direction, fundraising, and major customer relationships.

Leadership Team > Executive Team
Julien Caron serves as CTO and owns platform architecture, security posture, and engineering standards.

Leadership Team > Executive Team
Sofia Benali serves as VP of Engineering and manages delivery across product infrastructure, onboarding automation, and internal tooling.

Leadership Team > Functional Leaders
Marc Lefevre leads Support.
Nina Petrova leads the Onboarding team.
Thomas Rigal leads the Billing platform area.
chunks.title: Leadership Team

chunks.content:
Office Locations
Northstar Metrics operates from three main locations:
- Paris: headquarters, executive leadership, product strategy
- Lyon: customer support and operations hub
- Barcelona: sales and partnerships office

Office Locations
Paris is considered the official headquarters.
Barcelona is the main commercial office.
chunks.title: Office Locations

chunks.content:
Company Overview
**Northstar Metrics** is a fictional B2B SaaS company that provides analytics and workflow software for logistics teams, e-commerce operators, and internal support departments.

Company Overview
The company was founded in 2021 and is headquartered in **48 Rue de la République, 69002 Lyon, France**.

Company Overview > Leadership
- **CEO:** Claire Moreau
- **CTO:** Julien Caron
- **VP of Engineering:** Sofia Benali
- **Head of Support:** Marc Lefèvre
- **Tech Lead, Onboarding Team:** Nina Petrova
- **Tech Lead, Billing Team:** Thomas Rigal

Company Overview > Headcount
As of January 2026, Northstar Metrics has **86 employees**.

Company Overview > Headcount
Team breakdown:

Company Overview > Headcount
- Engineering: 34
- Product: 11
- Design: 5
- Sales: 14
- Customer Success: 9
- Support: 8
- Finance and Operations: 5

Company Overview > Offices > Headquarters
48 Rue de la République 
69002 Lyon 
France

Company Overview > Offices > Paris Sales Office
22 Avenue de l’Opéra 
75001 Paris 
France
chunks.title: Company Overview

chunks.content:
Company Overview > Customer Support
The support team handles account access issues, billing questions, onboarding guidance, and bug reports.

Company Overview > Customer Support
Main support email: **support@northstarmetrics.example**

Company Overview > Customer Support
Support hours:
- Monday to Friday
- 09:00 to 18:00 CET

Company Overview > Customer Support
Urgent enterprise support phone:
**+33 1 89 71 42 10**

Company Overview > Product and Pricing Notes
Northstar Metrics sells three plans:

Company Overview > Product and Pricing Notes
- **Starter** — €49/month
- **Growth** — €199/month
- **Enterprise** — custom pricing

Company Overview > Product and Pricing Notes
Customers on the Starter and Growth plans are billed monthly by default.

Company Overview > Product and Pricing Notes
Enterprise customers may be billed monthly or annually depending on contract terms.

Company Overview > Security and Access
For employee access to internal systems:
chunks.title: Company Overview

chunks.content:
Company Overview > Security and Access
- All employees must use SSO with multi-factor authentication.
- New hires receive access through the onboarding team.
- Access reviews are conducted every quarter.
- Production access is restricted to approved engineering staff.

Company Overview > Onboarding Notes
The onboarding team is led by **Nina Petrova**.

Company Overview > Onboarding Notes
During onboarding, new customers receive:

Company Overview > Onboarding Notes
1. Workspace setup
2. SSO configuration help
3. Import assistance for historical CSV data
4. A kickoff call with a customer success manager

Company Overview > Onboarding Notes
Typical onboarding duration for Growth customers is **7 to 10 business days**.

Company Overview > Finance Notes
Refund requests are reviewed by the finance operations team.

Company Overview > Finance Notes
Finance operations reports to **Olivier Garnier**, Director of Finance.

Company Overview > Finance Notes
The billing operations contact is:
**billing@northstarmetrics.example**
chunks.title: Company Overview

chunks.content:
Incident — Login Outage, November 2025 > Summary
Between 08:42 and 10:16 CET, some customers experienced login failures caused by an SSO redirect loop.

Incident — Login Outage, November 2025 > Impact
Affected tenants could not complete login.
Support received repeated reports from Growth and Enterprise accounts.

Incident — Login Outage, November 2025 > Immediate Response
Engineering disabled the faulty redirect rule and support posted status updates to affected customers.
chunks.title: Incident 2025-11 Login Outage

chunks.content:
Incident — Billing Delay, December 2025
A delayed billing job caused invoice generation to run several hours late for a subset of monthly accounts.

Incident — Billing Delay, December 2025
No duplicate charges were created, but some customers contacted support after not seeing expected invoices in the portal.
chunks.title: Incident 2025-12 Billing Delay

chunks.content:
Postmortem — Login Outage, November 2025 > Root Cause
A recently deployed redirect rule introduced a loop for a subset of SSO configurations.

Postmortem — Login Outage, November 2025 > Contributing Factors
- insufficient tenant-specific regression testing
- limited alerting on redirect anomalies

Postmortem — Login Outage, November 2025 > Follow-up Actions
- add regression coverage for tenant-specific SSO flows
- improve incident timeline summaries
- update support macros for login outage communication
chunks.title: Postmortem 2025-11 Login Outage
chunks.section_heading: Postmortem — Login Outage, November 2025 > Root Cause

chunks.content:
Ops Sync — 2025-12-03 > Notes
- repeated confusion around refund eligibility wording
- support asked for clearer macros for failed-payment grace period explanations
- billing asked support to avoid promising manual exceptions too early
chunks.title: Ops Sync 2025-12-03

chunks.content:
Product Sync — 2025-12-10 > Notes
- product wants Northstar Assist to summarize ticket timelines
- support wants better billing-risk highlighting
- roadmap includes role-aware retrieval and multilingual support
chunks.title: Product Sync 2025-12-10

chunks.content:
Support Review — 2025-12-17 > Recurring Issues
- password reset confusion
- refund window misunderstandings
- expectations about weekend support on non-Enterprise plans
- delayed invoice visibility after the December billing incident
chunks.title: Support Review 2025-12-17

chunks.content:
Onboarding Checklist
- Confirm customer stakeholders
- Validate SSO requirements
- Configure environments
- Import baseline data
- Schedule training
- Confirm support routing
chunks.title: Onboarding Checklist

chunks.content:
Onboarding Process
Enterprise onboarding usually lasts 2 to 4 weeks depending on data migration and stakeholder availability.

Onboarding Process
New Enterprise customers receive:
- a kickoff session
- configuration guidance
- access setup support
- training materials
- weekly check-ins during rollout
chunks.title: Onboarding Process

chunks.content:
Onboarding Team Responsibilities
Nina Petrova is the Tech Lead for the Onboarding team.

Onboarding Team Responsibilities
The onboarding team handles:
- new customer activation
- access setup coordination
- launch checklists
- rollout follow-up with support and product teams
chunks.title: Onboarding Team Responsibilities

chunks.content:
Pricing and Plans > Starter
Starter customers are billed monthly by default.
Starter includes email support during standard support hours.

Pricing and Plans > Growth
Growth customers are billed monthly by default.
Growth includes priority weekday support and onboarding guidance.

Pricing and Plans > Enterprise
Enterprise contracts may be billed monthly or annually depending on the signed agreement.
Enterprise customers receive named onboarding contacts and access to escalation channels.
chunks.title: Pricing and Plans

chunks.content:
Product Overview
Northstar Metrics offers three main product surfaces:
- Northstar Core: operational analytics dashboards
- Northstar Assist: AI-assisted support summarization and triage
- Northstar Flow: workflow automation and escalations

Product Overview
Northstar Assist is the newest product line and is heavily used by support teams for summarizing tickets, drafting replies, and highlighting account risk.
chunks.title: Product Overview

chunks.content:
Release Notes — November 2025 > Northstar Assist
- Added ticket summarization in English and French
- Added internal draft reply suggestions for support agents
- Added priority flag suggestions for VIP accounts

Release Notes — November 2025 > Platform
- Improved SSO error logging
- Reduced dashboard load time on the order risk page
chunks.title: Release Notes November 2025

chunks.content:
Release Notes — December 2025 > Northstar Assist
- Added ticket summarization in Spanish
- Added refund-risk highlighting for billing tickets
- Added side-by-side incident timeline summaries
- Improved confidence labeling for generated reply drafts

Release Notes — December 2025 > Platform
- Fixed intermittent login redirect loop for some SSO users
- Added support macro analytics
chunks.title: Release Notes December 2025

chunks.content:
Product Roadmap — Q1 2026 > Planned Priorities
- Role-aware retrieval for internal knowledge search
- Billing exception assistant for support teams
- Ticket clustering for repeated incident patterns
- Expanded multilingual support for Northstar Assist
chunks.title: Product Roadmap Q1 2026

chunks.content:
Access Reviews
Access reviews are conducted every quarter.

Access Reviews
Production access is restricted to approved engineering and operations staff.

Access Reviews
Managers must review access grants for departing employees within 24 hours of offboarding.
chunks.title: Access Reviews

chunks.content:
Authentication Rules
All employees must use SSO with multi-factor authentication.

Authentication Rules
Customers can authenticate with email/password or SSO depending on plan and configuration.

Authentication Rules
Password reset links expire after 24 hours.
chunks.title: Authentication Rules

chunks.content:
Production Access
Production access is restricted to approved engineering and operations personnel.

Production Access
Support agents do not receive production access by default.

Production Access
Temporary exceptions must be approved and time-bound.
chunks.title: Production Access

chunks.content:
SSO and MFA
SSO is mandatory for all internal employees.
Multi-factor authentication is mandatory for all employees and recommended for all customers.

SSO and MFA
Several login issues in November 2025 were traced to an SSO redirect loop affecting a subset of tenants.
chunks.title: SSO and MFA

chunks.content:
Escalation Policy
Support agents escalate issues when:
- production access is blocked for approved staff
- billing failures affect multiple customers
- authentication incidents affect more than one tenant
- a VIP customer reports repeated outages within 7 days

Escalation Policy
Escalations should be opened within 30 minutes for Sev-1 incidents and within 2 hours for Sev-2 incidents.
chunks.title: Escalation Policy

chunks.content:
Support FAQ > Password Reset
Password reset links expire after 24 hours.

Support FAQ > Refund Requests
Refund requests must follow the billing policy and be submitted within the defined refund window.

Support FAQ > Weekend Help
Weekend support is reserved for eligible Enterprise contracts.
chunks.title: Support FAQ

chunks.content:
SLA Policy > First Response Targets
- Starter: within 1 business day
- Growth: within 4 business hours
- Enterprise: within 1 business hour

SLA Policy > Resolution Expectations
Resolution times vary by issue severity and dependency on engineering teams.
chunks.title: SLA Policy

chunks.content:
Support Hours
Standard support is available Monday to Friday, 09:00 to 18:00 CET.

Support Hours
Priority support for Growth customers is available Monday to Friday, 08:00 to 20:00 CET.

Support Hours
Weekend support is only guaranteed for Enterprise customers with premium coverage.
chunks.title: Support Hours

chunks.content:
Support Playbook

SLA:
- Critical issues: respond within 1 hour
- Normal issues: respond within 24 hours

Escalation:
- Billing issues go to finance support
- Login/auth issues go to technical support
- Security issues should be escalated immediately

Password reset:
If the reset email is not received, instruct the user to check spam, then retry after 5 minutes.
chunks.title: Support Playbook

chunks.content:
Ticket 001 — Refund Request
Customer on Starter plan requested a refund 6 days after billing.
Support confirmed the request was inside the refund window and routed it to billing for review.

Ticket 001 — Refund Request
Outcome: refund approved.
chunks.title: Ticket 001 Refund Request

chunks.content:
Ticket 002 — Late Refund Request
Customer requested a refund 21 days after billing.
Support explained that the request was outside the standard refund window.

Ticket 002 — Late Refund Request
Outcome: refund denied.
chunks.title: Ticket 002 Late Refund Request

chunks.content:
Ticket 003 — Failed Payment Concern
Customer reported a failed payment and asked whether service would stop immediately.

Ticket 003 — Failed Payment Concern
Support explained the 3-day grace period and confirmed that automatic retries would occur before restriction.
chunks.title: Ticket 003 Failed Payment Concern

chunks.content:
Ticket 004 — Weekend Support Request
Growth customer requested guaranteed weekend support for a migration weekend.

Ticket 004 — Weekend Support Request
Support clarified that guaranteed weekend support is only included for eligible Enterprise contracts with premium coverage.
chunks.title: Ticket 004 Weekend Support Request

chunks.content:
Ticket 005 — Password Reset Issue
Customer reported that a password reset link no longer worked the next day.

Ticket 005 — Password Reset Issue
Support confirmed that password reset links expire after 24 hours and issued a new reset flow.
chunks.title: Ticket 005 Password Reset Issue
